title: Performized
description: Performized aims to improve Minecraft's performance to the best of its ability.
body:
**By using, modifying, or distributing this Modpack, you agree to the [Performized Public License](https://performized.lovable.app).** ⚡ Get update notifications, share your benchmarks, and hang with other players running Performized; join the Discord by clicking [here](https://discord.gg/fbkznttX77). ![performized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420009148bfc3127ff4b622f8ae960f0cc8a5fa7.png) **Performized offers great performance with no extra non-optimization mods built-in! It is for players that solely want performance and add their mods in, or like Vanilla Minecraft, or those who want to add their own mods and make a new modpack, but please follow our license when doing so.** Performized is an **advanced optimization modpack** built for players who want **maximum performance without sacrificing any quality**. Whether you’re building mega bases, adding all of these mods to your own modpack, or just want buttery-smooth vanilla gameplay, we have you covered! > **Performized also has a Quilt version!** Play without Fabric and keep all the performance. Huge flexibility for players and pack makers. # 👀 Performance Improvements Performized aims to improve your performance while you are in the game normally, in both multiplayer and singleplayer. # ❤️ Fully Maintained The project is currently fully maintained and **we currently aim to push out Performized for new Minecraft updates as fast as possible.**
The Versioning System # The New Versioning System of Performized The versioning system of Performized follows a pattern of: "." The grade is determined as follows: 1 = 50% to 60% of the mods that Performized is using are compatible with the Performized version. 2 = 60% to 70% of the mods that Performized is using are compatible with the Performized version. 3 = 70% to 80% of the mods that Performized is using are compatible with the Performized version. 4 = 80% to 90% of the mods that Performized is using are compatible with the Performized version. 5 = Over 90% of the mods that Performized is using are compatible with the Performized version. The version number resets every time a new grade comes. This versioning system is hereby introduced as of the 27th of May.
